mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Pet(owner_id, pet_name, pet_type, breed, gender, birth_date, weight, color, distinctive_features, chip_number, avatar) VALUES(#{owner.id}, #{petName}, #{petType}, #{breed}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{weight}, #{color}, #{distinctiveFeatures}, #{chipNumber}, #{avatar})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.username AS owner_name FROM Pet p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT p.*, u.username AS owner_name FROM Pet p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id WHERE p.owner_id = #{ownerId}
SELECT p.*, u.username AS owner_name FROM Pet p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id WHERE p.chip_number = #{chipNumber}
SELECT p.*, u.username AS owner_name FROM Pet p LEFT JOIN User u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE Pet SET pet_name = #{petName}, pet_type = #{petType}, breed = #{breed}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, weight = #{weight}, color = #{color}, distinctive_features = #{distinctiveFeatures}, chip_number = #{chipNumber}, avatar = #{avatar} WHERE id = #{id}
